sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 1,500 Scarlet & Violet 151 booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 13.28% ±1.57, Illustration Rare 8.50% ±1.29, Ultra Rare 6.44% ±1.13, Special Illustration Rare 3.11% ±0.80, Hyper Rare 1.94% ±0.64. One documented short-print anomaly: Illustration Rare Caterpie measured 0.17%, BELOW the 95% CI floor (0.20%) for its tier — the only card in the study outside its interval, so per-card odds for Caterpie specifically may be optimistic here. God Packs exist in 151 (full IR/SIR starter evolution lines) but the study states they are too rare to meaningfully influence card availability; they are unmodelled. The foil-energy slot (24.83% ±2.00) is unmodelled — foil basic energies carry negligible market value. Version 1 used republished figures capped at low; this is the same study read at the source.
